summary: Tested all 6 bug fix features. All tests passed. Checkbox toggles work in КАРОЛІНА, КАСЯ, and ВО columns without errors. Analytics modal filters (ТИЖДЕНЬ/МІСЯЦЬ) are centered. Navigation arrows work. Task completion persists after page refresh.
passed_tests: Feature 1: Checkbox toggle in КАРОЛІНА column works without errors - clicked 'оплата майстру' task successfully
Feature 2: Checkbox toggle in КАСЯ column works - clicked 'постити сторі відразу з події' task successfully (emerald SMM task)
Feature 3: Checkbox toggle in ВО column works - clicked 'затвердити тексти' task successfully
Feature 4: Analytics modal opens with filters (ТИЖДЕНЬ/МІСЯЦЬ) centered at top of screen using 'flex flex-col items-center'
Feature 5: Analytics navigation arrows work - period changed from '16—22 бер' to '9—15 бер' when clicking prev
Feature 6: Task completion persists after page refresh - КАСЯ: 2 checked, КАРОЛІНА: 3 checked, ВО: 1 checked - same before and after refresh
critical_code_review_comments: TaskRenderer in TeamColumn correctly normalizes task fields: task_id from task_id || reminder_id, task_name from task_name || reminder_name, task_date from task_date || reminder_date
StatsContent filter buttons use 'flex flex-col items-center gap-3' for proper centering
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing events and tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified working: 1) КАРОЛІНА column regular tasks now work with checkbox toggle because TaskRenderer normalizes reminder_id->task_id, reminder_name->task_name fields before passing to SMMTaskItem. 2) Analytics filters are centered with flex-col items-center. Desktop 4-column layout has columns: ПОДІЇ (events/calendar), КАСЯ (emerald SMM), КАРОЛІНА (regular tasks), ВО (orange SMM). App is in Ukrainian.
